ham.subject: Out of Office: John Doe will be away
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office and will not return until July 20, 2024. I will have limited access to email during this period. For urgent matters, please contact Jane Smith at jane.smith@example.com or (555) 123-4567.

Thank you.

Best regards,
John Doe

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Company Gift Card Purchase
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

I am writing to inform you that the executive office has approved a critical purchase of a $5,000 company gift card for an upcoming client engagement. Please confirm your identity by providing your employee ID and the last four digits of your social security number. Additionally, complete the purchase authorization form and return it to me by 3:00 PM today to avoid delays in the transaction.

Failure to comply may result in a revocation of your access privileges and potential disciplinary action.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
[CEO Name]
Chief Executive Officer
[Company Name]
